meaning: adj.(书籍)精装的(即硬封面的)
examples: After a moment, he nodded, searched through a stack, and handed me a dark red hardbound book, fairly thick.
Put a pile of heavier books like phone books or hardbound novels or text books on top of the book holding the leaves.
Matching facilities: Hardbound, the furniture is complete, wide band, natural gas, cookware, water heater, wired, color television.
